tasks.title: Project scaffold: XcodeGen project.yml (app + widget extension + unit/UI test bundle targets), folder skeleton matching lane ownership — pbxproj is generated only, never hand-edited
acceptance_criteria: xcodegen generate produces a project that builds an empty app + empty widget target
Folder skeleton matches the four-lane ownership map exactly, no stray top-level files
project.pbxproj is generated from project.yml; no lane hand-edits it directly
Domain/, Services/, Data/, Features/, Polish/, Widget/ created as empty directory skeletons only — this task does not claim content ownership of files placed inside them by other tasks

tasks.title: Domain models and fixed enums (Item, ConditionEntry, ValueEntry, AppSettings, Category, ItemStatus, ConditionGrade, ValueType, PhotoAssetRef, PurchaseFacts)
acceptance_criteria: All @Model types compile under Swift 6 strict concurrency
creationSequence exists as the mandatory active-25 tiebreak
amount/purchaseAmount fields are Decimal, never Double or Int
Category/ItemStatus/ConditionGrade/ValueType match the locked fixed enum cases exactly

tasks.title: Pure display-state and partition functions with exhaustive unit tests
acceptance_criteria: computeDisplayState precedence verified: deleted > locked > incomplete > normal
partitionActiveAndLocked is O(n), tested with tied creationSequence values
restore-at-cap and delete-of-locked-item-promotes-next-oldest covered by parametrized tests
zero UI or SwiftData dependency in these files

tasks.title: Concrete SwiftData-backed ItemRepository (full method set) + App Group ModelContainer factory, tested against real in-memory persistence
acceptance_criteria: loadActiveAndLocked delegates to partitionActiveAndLocked, never reimplements the split
All ItemRepository methods from interfaces-json implemented and tested against ModelConfiguration(isStoredInMemoryOnly: true)
softDelete/restore/purgeExpiredDeletedItems verified with injected dates, not wall-clock waiting
ModelContainerFactory builds the container at the App Group path from the full model schema, confirmed via a write-then-read-from-widget-target smoke test

tasks.title: Disk-backed PhotoStore protocol + implementation
acceptance_criteria: All paths relative to App Group container root
Thumbnails generated off-main via byPreparingThumbnail
Returns PhotoAssetRef with real pixel dimensions, never a bare path string
removeAssets tested for both item-level and entry-level cleanup

tasks.title: AppLockService (LocalAuthentication) — rough, unstyled gate
acceptance_criteria: deviceAuthenticationAvailable() returns false and access is allowed (never trapped) when no device passcode is set
authenticate() tested via a fake for both success and failure paths

tasks.title: App Group entitlements, PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy, PrivacyOverlayModifier, widget target skeleton, App-Group write/read smoke test
acceptance_criteria: App writes to the shared App Group container and the widget target reads the same data in a smoke test
PrivacyOverlayModifier swaps in on scenePhase background transition, verified in isolation
Required-reason API usage declared in the privacy manifest

tasks.title: App entry point + RootView composing lock gate and privacy overlay
acceptance_criteria: Cold launch and return-from-background show the lock screen only when device auth is available
PrivacyOverlayModifier applied at root, not per-screen
ModelContainer bootstrapped once via ModelContainerFactory and injected via environment

tasks.title: Vision classification service + label-to-Category mapping fixture harness (open-ended investigation)
acceptance_criteria: Fixture set covers all six categories with expected-category assertions, not just smoke tests
Returns nil below the confidence floor rather than a low-confidence guess
Mapping table is a reviewed lookup artifact, not an inline switch

tasks.title: Capture vertical slice: CaptureState machine, camera + library fallback, draft creation at photo-capture time, Quick Log save
acceptance_criteria: Photo capture persists a real Item row (draft) before the sheet finishes presenting
Save works with only photo+title+category, in well under a minute
Vision suggestion highlights a chip silently, never blocks or delays Save
Backgrounding/force-quit mid-capture resumes the same draft on relaunch
Basic smoke UI test confirms capture-to-list happy path

tasks.title: Catalog Home: active list, Preserved/Locked shelf, empty/loading/success/error states
acceptance_criteria: All four states reachable and visually distinct
Preserved/Locked section always visible, never interleaved as dimmed rows
Every card's badge driven by ItemDisplayState, no ad hoc per-screen state checks

tasks.title: Capture-to-save timing + interrupted-capture integration test (with app-lock foreground-return interaction)
acceptance_criteria: Automated timing assertion: tap-Add to saved-item well under 60s
Backgrounded/force-quit capture verified resumable, tested specifically alongside the app-lock foreground-return interaction

tasks.title: Item Detail trust layer: purchase facts, condition/provenance timeline, value ledger, locked teaser, near-empty states
acceptance_criteria: Three modules render as visually separate, never merged into one feed
Cover photo distinct from timeline-entry photos
Value module renders locked-teaser vs live vs read-only-preserved correctly per subscription/downgrade state
Full VoiceOver pass across the module stack

tasks.title: Recently Deleted + Preserved/Locked read-only list + undo toast
acceptance_criteria: Delete fires an inline Undo toast immediately, independent of navigating to Recently Deleted
Recently Deleted reached via overflow/toolbar affordance, not a home-screen scroll section
Attempted edit on a locked item shows the upgrade prompt, never the repair flow

tasks.title: RecoveryPurgeScheduler + downgrade/restore-at-cap/promotion scenario integration tests
acceptance_criteria: Purge runs only at launch/foreground with an injected now, never a background task scheduler
Downgrade-with->25-items, restore-at-cap, and delete-of-locked-item-promotes-next-oldest all verified end to end

tasks.title: ExportService: main-actor document snapshot mapping, off-main PDF rendering, native paged preview generation
acceptance_criteria: buildDocumentModel completes all SwiftData reads/mapping on the main actor before handing off to the background renderer
renderPDF never touches PDFView; preview pages generated as rasterized images with explicit page-position metadata
Concurrency-safety test: mutate a value entry mid-render, exported document reflects the pre-mutation snapshot

tasks.title: Export Preview screen: mode toggle, paged accessible preview, all named states
acceptance_criteria: TabView(.page) preview announces Page N of M correctly to VoiceOver
Zero-item collection export renders a real sparse page, never blank
Generating/failed/locked-upsell states all reachable

tasks.title: EntitlementProvider (StoreKit 2): CachedEntitlement, EntitlementState, isSubscriptionActive, transaction listener
acceptance_criteria: isSubscriptionActive is the only conversion point from EntitlementState to Bool, verified no other lane inlines its own switch
unknownOffline never silently collapses to free by omission
Listener task started once at launch

tasks.title: Paywall screen with real redacted export mock built from the actual export pipeline
acceptance_criteria: Redacted mock uses real section headers/photo placement/typography from ExportDocumentModel, never a placeholder image
StoreKit product-fetch failure shows a retry state, never a silently broken paywall
Restore-purchases link present and functional against EntitlementProvider

tasks.title: Full export verification matrix + VoiceOver page-position integration test
acceptance_criteria: 0/1-sparse/1-dense/many-photo item counts all verified structurally correct
Temp export files confirmed cleaned up after share-sheet completion or dismissal

tasks.title: CollectionSummaryProvider + WidgetReloadCoordinator
acceptance_criteria: Single source of truth for widget and any in-app aggregate value display, never computed twice independently
Widget reload debounced/coalesced on local write events, not fired per-save

tasks.title: Widget UI: free (item count) vs paid (collection value) states
acceptance_criteria: Free tier shows item count, paid tier shows collection value, no other content
Tap-to-open only, no deep-linking or in-widget actions
Respects the same privacy-overlay discipline as the rest of the app

tasks.title: StoreKit SKTestSession scenario suite: purchase/restore/downgrade/offline-startup
acceptance_criteria: Offline-startup unknownOffline verified to never silently collapse to free
Downgrade preserves data (hides, never deletes) and resubscribe restores full access with no migration step

tasks.title: Final end-to-end regression pass
acceptance_criteria: Relaunch persistence, interrupted capture, full VoiceOver core loop, PDF correctness at 0/1/many items, and purge scheduler all verified together in one pass
No regression in any earlier milestone's verified behavior
